text: Data for Sub-Task 1 of the Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation task at Touché 2025. The data used here consists of segments that were retrieved from the segmented MS MARCO V2.1 corpus. Queries for the retrieval were sampled from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 dataset.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
